utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh yeah , where ... where is the guy who decides who pictures go up on the wall ?

utterances.speaker: Female Clerk
utterances.text: He is not here right now .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All ... all right , well make sure you tell him that Joey Tribbiani stopped by to drop off all of these clothes .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am an actor . I am kinda getting my picture up there on the wall .

utterances.speaker: Female Clerk
utterances.text: You know , there are two people who could put your picture up there .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh really ? Well , maybe you and I go out for drinks ? You are the other one right ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_there are two people who could put your picture up there .
